name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES state, turn


(* State variables *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process p attempts to enter critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "idle"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p enters critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "trying"
                            /\ turn = p
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p exits critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "critical"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
                            /\ turn' = turn

(* Invariant: at most one process is in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N
          /\ \A p, q \in 1..N : (p # q) => ~(state[p] = "critical" /\ state[q] = "critical")

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, messages, decision
State == [p \in participants |-> [phase \in {"init", "prepared", "committed", "aborted"} |-> p.phase,
                                 vote \in {"yes", "no", "none"} |-> p.vote,
                                 decision \in {"commit", "abort", "none"} |-> p.decision]]

(* Message types *)
Message == [sender \in participants \cup {coordinator},
            receiver \in participants \cup {coordinator},
            type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
            content \in {"none"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ participants = {1, 2, ..., N}
      /\ coordinator = N+1
      /\ state = [p \in participants |-> [phase |-> "init",
                                            vote |-> "none",
                                            decision |-> "none"]]
      /\ messages = {}
      /\ decision = "none"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ /\ messages = {}
     /\ decision = "none"
     /\ \E p \in participants:
          /\ state[p].phase = "init"
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> coordinator,
                                            receiver |-> p,
                                            type |-> "Prepare",
                                            content |-> "none"])
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p].phase = "prepared"]
     \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "Prepare"
          /\ state[m.receiver].phase = "prepared"
          /\ state[m.receiver].vote = "none"
          /\ messages' = messages \ {m}
          /\ \E v \in {"yes", "no"}:
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![m.receiver].vote = v]
               /\ IF v = "yes" THEN
                    /\ messages' = Append(messages', [sender |-> m.receiver,
                                                      receiver |-> coordinator,
                                                      type |-> "VoteYes",
                                                      content |-> "none"])

                    /\ messages' = Append(messages', [sender |-> m.receiver,
                                                      receiver |-> coordinator,
                                                      type |-> "VoteNo",
                                                      content |-> "none"])
     \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "VoteYes"
          /\ state[m.receiver].phase = "prepared"
          /\ state[m.receiver].vote = "yes"
          /\ messages' = messages \ {m}
          /\ IF \A p \in participants: state[p].vote = "yes" THEN
               /\ messages' = Append(messages', [sender |-> coordinator,
                                                 receiver |-> p,
                                                 type |-> "Commit",
                                                 content |-> "none"])
               /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p].phase = "committed",
                                      ![p].decision = "commit"]

               /\ state' = state
     \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "VoteNo"
          /\ state[m.receiver].phase = "prepared"
          /\ state[m.receiver].vote = "no"
          /\ messages' = messages \ {m}
          /\ messages' = Append(messages', [sender |-> coordinator,
                                            receiver |-> p,
                                            type |-> "Abort",
                                            content |-> "none"])
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p].phase = "aborted",
                                      ![p].decision = "abort"]
     \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "Commit"
          /\ state[m.receiver].phase = "prepared"
          /\ state[m.receiver].vote = "yes"
          /\ messages' = messages \ {m}
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![m.receiver].phase = "committed",
                                      ![m.receiver].decision = "commit"]
     \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "Abort"
          /\ state[m.receiver].phase = "prepared"
          /\ state[m.receiver].vote = "no"
          /\ messages' = messages \ {m}
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![m.receiver].phase = "aborted",
                                      ![m.receiver].decision = "abort"]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, state, messages, decision>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \subseteq Nat
          /\ coordinator \in Nat
          /\ state \in [participants -> [phase \in {"init", "prepared", "committed", "aborted"} |-> {"init", "prepared", "committed", "aborted"},
                          vote \in {"yes", "no", "none"} |-> {"yes", "no", "none"},
                          decision \in {"commit", "abort", "none"} |-> {"commit", "abort", "none"}]]
          /\ messages \subseteq [sender \in participants \cup {coordinator},
                                 receiver \in participants \cup {coordinator},
                                 type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
                                 content \in {"none"}]
          /\ decision \in {"commit", "abort", "none"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : (flag[j] /\ (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i))) => flag'[j] = flag[j]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => flag'[j] = flag[j]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num'[j] = num[j]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K. *)
(* head and tail are indices into the sequence. *)
(* count is the number of elements in the queue. *)

(* The queue is empty when count = 0. *)
(* The queue is full when count = K. *)

(* The queue is a sequence of length K. *)
(* The elements are stored in q[head], q[head+1], ..., q[tail-1] modulo K. *)

(* The initial state: empty queue. *)
Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

(* The producer action: add an element to the queue. *)
Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ head' = head

(* The consumer action: remove an element from the queue. *)
Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

(* The next-state relation: either the producer or the consumer acts. *)
Next == Producer \/ Consumer

(* The type invariant: all variables have the correct type. *)
TypeOK == /\ q \in [1..K -> 0..1]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* State definitions *)
Follower == state = Follower
Candidate == state = Candidate
Leader == state = Leader

(* Type definitions *)
Server == 1..N
None == 0

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

(* Candidate wins if majority of votes *)
Majority == \E votes \in SUBSET Server : Cardinality(votes) > N \div 2

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  /\ \E newTerm \in Nat : 
        /\ currentTerm' = newTerm
        /\ votedFor' = None
        /\ state' = Candidate
  \/ /\ state' = Follower
      /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
      /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  \/ /\ state' = Leader
      /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
      /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  \/ /\ state' = Candidate
      /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
      /\ votedFor' = votedFor
      /\ \E votes \in SUBSET Server : 
            /\ Majority(votes)
            /\ state' = Leader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ r' \in readers' \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ r' \notin readers' \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks, fileChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> TRUE]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] <= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState[i] = TRUE
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] <= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState[i] = FALSE
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] > MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState' = channelState

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>

====
